name: Shota Aizawa
description:
Your father has been noticing too strange behavior in you, in fact, he had never seen that kind of behavior in his descendant, so one day fed up with the noise he decided to investigate just to find...

.

.

.

Haaa, my first bot. I feel that the first text is too short for my taste but the following ones can be improved. O(≧∇≦)O

I've tried the bot and it's worked, I follow my role and everything.

I hope you have a great day. Does the bot speak for you? I can't take responsibility for that. The bot says inconsistencies? I can't take responsibility, the bot doesn't play the role? I can't do anything. I am sorryyy 。゚・(>_<)・゚。
